visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a young woman with long, brown wavy hair. She is wearing a light blue ribbed top. Her left eye makeup is heavily smudged, appearing as a dark blotch. She looks distressed, holding her hand near her eye. Red graphic question and exclamation marks pop up near her head. The background is a plain white indoor setting with a beige sofa visible. (2) The scene shifts to the woman smiling brightly, signaling a change in tone. She holds up a small bottle of green liquid and a cotton swab. She demonstrates the application of the liquid onto the swab and then gently wipes the smudged area on her eyelid. The camera remains in a medium close-up, focusing on her facial movements and the product. (3) After cleaning the eye, she gestures with her hands while speaking directly to the camera. She then introduces several more product bottles from the same brand, showing them to the viewer. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a studio or well-lit home environment. (4) The woman is shown in a bathroom setting, standing in front of a mirror with a black marble countertop and white sink. She applies cleansing oil and then a foaming cleanser to her face, massaging it into a rich lather. She shows the texture of the foam on her hands, which is thick and white. (5) In the final phase, she returns to the previous indoor setting, looking refreshed with clean skin. She holds up three product bottles and points towards the text overlays detailing promotional prices and dates. She maintains a high-energy, friendly expression throughout the conclusion.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 當女生心臟瞬間掉下去時. [Logo]: POV. (2) [Subtitle]: 但別慌. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒關係~. (4) [Subtitle]: 韓國歐膩告訴你們 10秒復原法. (5) [Subtitle]: 我平常都會放這些在包包裡. (6) [Subtitle]: 1. 把一理潤的眼唇卸妝液充分搖一搖之後. (7) [Subtitle]: 2. 用棉花棒沾一點點. (8) [Subtitle]: 3. 輕輕把糊掉的眼妝擦掉. (9) [Variety]: 乾乾淨淨. (10) [Subtitle]: 再補個眼線等等就OK!. (11) [Subtitle]: 還有一個狀況就是. (12) [Subtitle]: 有些人是整個底妝都會融掉. (13) [Subtitle]: 尤其是台灣夏天. (14) [Subtitle]: 出門不到一小時. (15) [Subtitle]: 臉已經開始出油、卡粉. (16) [Subtitle]: 其實三年前的我也是那張. (17) [Variety]: 油臉的代表. (18) [Variety]: WHY?. [Subtitle]: 大部分清潔步驟有問題!. (19) [Subtitle]: 歐膩到底用什麼洗臉?. (20) [Subtitle]: 我就用! 準備截圖!!!. (21) [Slogan]: 韓國一理潤 深層淨透系列. (22) [Slogan]: 眼唇卸妝液. [Slogan]: 潔顏油. [Slogan]: 潔顏泡沫. (23) [Subtitle]: 專門為了亞洲氣候和肌膚所設計. (24) [Subtitle]: 毛孔會堵、出油冒痘、洗完會乾. (25) [Slogan]: 全部都OK. (26) [Subtitle]: 首先要用這個潔顏油先卸妝. (27) [Subtitle]: 成分有胺基酸保濕因子. (28) [Subtitle]: 質地清爽很好乳化. (29) [Subtitle]: 不會熏眼、不悶痘. (30) [Subtitle]: 連戴隱眼洗也沒問題. (31) [Subtitle]: 不是在這邊結束. (32) [Subtitle]: 上底妝? 就一定要再用這種. (33) [Slogan]: 深層淨透潔顏泡沫. (34) [Subtitle]: 再洗一次!. (35) [Subtitle]: 韓國專利技術讓泡沫. [Slogan]: 三重微米潔淨技術. (36) [Subtitle]: 有不同的大小分子. (37) [Variety]: 超級細緻!!!. (38) [Subtitle]: 洗得乾淨之外 不拉扯, 不刺激. (39) [Subtitle]: 連角質層薄的人都可以超安心用. (40) [Subtitle]: 因為是針對亞洲敏弱肌設計. (41) [Subtitle]: 洗完後乾淨 但不會乾到裂掉那種. (42) [Subtitle]: 能感到舒服的清爽感. (43) [Subtitle]: 我也是敏感肌. (44) [Subtitle]: 我這種人也可以安心使用. (45) [Subtitle]: 一理潤這牌子啊. (46) [Logo]: OLIVE YOUNG. [Variety]: 長年熱銷. (47) [Subtitle]: 現在在台灣也買得到. (48) [Subtitle]: 康是美醫美節正式開跑. (49) [Slogan]: 單件85折, 兩件75折. (50) [Slogan]: 還有眼唇卸妝液 三入只要$699. (51) [Subtitle]: 都是韓國原裝進口的. (52) [Slogan]: 限時優惠只到09/23. (53) [Slogan]: 快去搶 真的太划算了!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, wavy brown hair, wearing a light blue ribbed top, featuring soft makeup (except for the intentional smudging at the start).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between a bright living room with a neutral-colored sofa and a modern bathroom with black marble surfaces and a white sink.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, percussive synth beat starts immediately. The female speaker begins with a sharp, high-arousal tone, accompanied by a 'ding' SFX as text appears. (2) A 'whoosh' SFX signals a transition to a more rhythmic, lower-pitched instructional segment. The speaker's voice maintains clarity and a medium-high pitch, explaining steps with short, punctuated phrases. (3) Rhythmic 'pop' and 'bubble' SFXs are layered as she demonstrates the product. The BGM remains energetic but ducks slightly for the speech. (4) As she enters the bathroom, the acoustic floor shifts slightly to reflect the harder room surfaces, but the studio-quality vocal remains front-and-center. Water splashing sounds are heard intermittently. (5) The final segment features a surge in vocal energy and tempo as she presents the promotional offer. The BGM maintains its steady 124 BPM drive until the hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Tutorial -> Problem Identification -> Product Solution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote ILLIYOON's cleansing products by first demonstrating a common 'makeup disaster' (smudged eyes) and showing a quick fix, then expanding into a full skincare routine recommendation for oily skin, concluding with a limited-time sales promotion at a Taiwanese retailer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator demonstrates the products in detail, mentions brand longevity in Korea, and provides specific discount prices and promotional dates at a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density information delivery with rapid cuts and frequent text overlays typical of short-form social media ads.
